title: Sharper Image - Remote Control Xtreme Cage Car - Rechargeable RC Car, Kids Toy for Girls & Boys
features: ONE-BUTTON STUNTS: Easily control and manoeuvre the X-Treme Roll. With one-button stunts and controls, it is perfect for beginners and a breeze to operate. Designed for beginners and seasoned enthusiasts alike, this feature-packed drone offers easy manoeuvrability and seamless operation with just a touch.

EXTENDED PLAYTIME: Extend your playtime with the USB-C rechargeable battery, offering up to 30 minutes of non-stop excitement on a single charge! Say goodbye to interruptions and hello to continuous fun as you immerse yourself in thrilling action without worrying about running out of power.

DAY & NIGHT ADVENTURES: Equipped with bright LED headlights, the X-Treme Roll is perfect for both daytime and nighttime play, ensuring your vehicle is always visible. Whether you're racing under the sun or exploring under the stars, rest assured your vehicle will remain visible, adding excitement to every moment of your journey.

ROUGH TERRAIN TUMBLER: Conquer any terrain with this high-speed, high-performance remote-control vehicle. It is built to conquer obstacles and power through rough terrain without missing a beat. Start adventures anytime with the X-Treme Roll, featuring bright LED headlights for fun day and night play!

SHARPER IMAGE: We offer the latest in-home electronics, cutting-edge gadgets, grooming essentials, travel gear, and innovative lifestyle products. Our collection is meticulously designed with the latest styles and technology.
description: Experience non-stop action with the Sharper Image X-Treme Roll, a high-performance remote control car expertly designed for effortless 360-degree spins, flips, and doughnuts. The durable curved roll cage allows for continuous play without interruptions by self-correcting after stunts. Ideal for beginners and enthusiasts alike, the X-Treme Roll boasts user-friendly one-button controls for easy manoeuvrability and spectacular stunts at your fingertips. Powered by a USB-C rechargeable battery, this remote control toy delivers up to 30 minutes of adrenaline-pumping action per charge, ensuring endless fun and excitement. Outfitted with bright LED headlights, the X-Treme Roll is perfect for both daytime and nighttime adventures, keeping your vehicle visible and illuminated as you perform daring stunts and conquer challenging terrain.
